description: Canonical math delimiter contract enforced across backend and frontend

inlineMath.note: KaTeX-compatible inline delimiter. Models must use this. Single $ is forbidden.
inlineMath.normalization: Frontend normalizes \(...\) to $...$ for remark-math compatibility

rules: All delimiters must be balanced and closed
Every opening delimiter requires a closing match
Do not place LaTeX outside math delimiters
Do not wrap equations in bold or italics
Leave a blank line before and after display equations
frontend_normalized_to: remark-math expects $...$ for inline and $$...$$ for display
